news.t: Is the Factor Leadership Rotation Finally Here?

holdings.infoBox: FDLO is an equity ETF with a total of 130 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 7.90%, Alphabet at 6.61%, Microsoft at 5.47%, Amazon.com at 4.13%, and Broadcom at 3.75%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Low Volatility Factor ETF (FDLO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Fidelity U.S. Low Volatility Factor index. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap US stocks selected for low volatility of returns and earnings. FDLO was launched on Sep 12, 2016 and is issued by Fidelity.
infoTable: Fidelity U.S. Low Volatility Factor Index

data.title: Is the Factor Leadership Rotation Finally Here?
data.text: While momentum, growth, and high-beta strategies have served as the engines driving quarter-to-date returns for factor ETFs, a subtle shift under the hood suggests a potential factor rotation may be u...
